Name: Frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' followed by 'Accepted + In Progress' across all cases
Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' occurrences that are part of variants ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' in variants that do not lead to 'Completed + Resolved' or 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' does not occur

Name: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' relative to the frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of cases where 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' appears more than once
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' events that occur before any 'Completed + In Call' activity in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Percentage of variants starting with 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' compared to all variants
Metric: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' followed by a waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation', 'Accepted + Wait - Customer', or 'Accepted + Wait')
Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' that is eventually followed by 'Completed + In Call' within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' occurring in cases that never reach 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' does not occur

Name: Ratio of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' to 'Completed + In Call' across the entire event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
